Created attachment 145121
svn diff on head

Please take this commit. SVN diff on head attached.

First official release of UMS V4 by upstream. For a full changelog see the entry entitled: "Changes since 4.0.0-b1"

http://www.universalmediaserver.com/forum/viewtopic.php?f=8&t=2032

This release is also meant to 'improve somewhat' broken web interface on FreeBSD. Since FreeBSD uses the linux release tarball.

Thanks @skeptical
